title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken pieces in a rich, spiced tomato and cream sauce.
steps: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces. Mix yogurt with half the garam masala, turmeric, and cumin. Marinate chicken for at least 30 minutes.
Thread chicken onto skewers (or place on a baking sheet) and grill or broil until charred, about 10 minutes.
Dice the onion, mince garlic and ginger. Heat oil in a large pan and cook onion until soft and golden.
Add garlic, ginger, remaining garam masala, and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add canned tomatoes and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in cream, add the grilled chicken, and simmer for another 10 minutes.
Season with salt and serve over basmati rice or with naan bread.
